metadata.name: Tune the SELinux Policy by Adjusting Booleans
metadata.description: Configure the Apache web service to publish web content from the user's home directory
objectives: Configure the Apache web service to publish web content from the user's home directory
Change the behavior of the SELinux system policy by activating SELinux Booleans

hosts.name: servera
hosts.description: Web server with user home directory access

tasks.name: Verify userdir.conf enables UserDir
tasks.description: The userdir.conf should have UserDir set to public_html (not disabled)
tasks.success_message: UserDir is configured to use public_html
hints: Comment out 'UserDir disabled' and uncomment 'UserDir public_html'

tasks.name: Verify httpd service is running
tasks.description: The Apache web service should be running
hints: Start httpd: sudo systemctl start httpd

tasks.name: Verify httpd service is enabled
tasks.description: The Apache web service should be enabled at boot
hints: Enable httpd: sudo systemctl enable --now httpd

tasks.name: Verify ~/public_html directory exists
tasks.description: The student user's public_html directory should exist

tasks.name: Verify ~/public_html/index.html exists with content
tasks.description: The index.html file should exist with student content
tasks.failure_message: index.html is missing or has incorrect content
hints: Create the file: echo 'This is student content on SERVERA.' > ~/public_html/index.html

tasks.name: Verify /home/student has correct permissions
tasks.description: The home directory should have 711 permissions to allow Apache access

tasks.name: Verify httpd_enable_homedirs boolean is on
tasks.description: The SELinux boolean httpd_enable_homedirs should be enabled persistently
hints: Enable the boolean: sudo setsebool -P httpd_enable_homedirs on

tasks.name: Verify user web content is accessible
tasks.description: The web page at http://servera/~student/index.html should be accessible

checks.command: curl -s http://localhost/~student/index.html | grep -q 'student content on SERVERA'

tasks.failure_message: User web content is not accessible
hints: Check httpd status: sudo systemctl status httpd
